meaning: n.为混饭吃而粗制滥造的文艺作品,粗制作品作家(或画家)
examples: All he wants to do is write a potboiler and get rich.
What could have been a standard potboiler of a sequel turns out to be one of the more creative and steady scary movies of the year?
Tom Clancy predicted this exact scenario in his 1991 potboiler The Sum of All Fears -- and it remains a perennial of public discussion.
He takes a single known fact and transforms the story into a potboiler.
Ultimately all that would remain was the original potboiler, more often than not the portrait of a grim British grandmother.
